title: Perspectives on Continual Learning: Survey Results and Forecasts
summary: Perspectives on Continual Learning: Survey Results and Forecasts
whyItMatters: This is the fifth post in the sequence Implications of Continual Learning for LLM Agents . Summary While writing our continual learning sequence, we sent a survey to a number of AI safety researchers with questions about continual learning. This post summarizes the results of that survey. We asked whether respondents agree with various arguments we advance…
